title: Dendrobium blaoense
taxonomy: Dendrobium blaoense is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Dendrobium is a large and diverse group of epiphytic and terrestrial orchids. Dendrobium blaoense is native to Vietnam and is often found in mountainous regions. The species is characterized by its unique flowers and growth habit, which distinguish it from other Dendrobium species.

The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat conditions such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
